D2 Vision L5 Evaluate Reference

Land's Retinex

slide an illumination gradient across a Mondrian and watch retinex integrate edges to recover flat reflectance

Retinex assumes illumination changes slowly while reflectance changes at sharp edges. Integrating only the steep edges along a path recovers each patch's true lightness.

Slide the illumination gradient to tilt the light across the Mondrian; the raw view dims toward one side. Toggle retinex and the gradient dissolves — only the edge-defined reflectances remain.
